login.title: Login
login.welcome: Sign in with the method you prefer to access your tasks.
login.description: Enter your email and password to continue.

afterRegister.title: Registration is almost complete
afterRegister.message: We sent a verification email to {{email}}. Follow the link from the email and then sign in to your account.

register.title: Register
register.description: Enter your email and password to register.

password.label: Password
password.hint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter and one number

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.number: Password must contain at least one number

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your account has been activated. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.alreadyVerifiedMessage: This email has already been verified. You can sign in to your account.
verifyEmail.errorMessage: The link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.
verifyEmail.missingToken: The verification link does not contain a token.

logout.label: Logout
logout.confirm: Do you want to log out?

security.title: Security
security.passwordEnabled: Password change is available for this account.
security.passwordDisabled: This account uses Google sign-in, so there is no local password configured right now.
security.sessionReset: After changing the password, the current session will be closed and you will need to sign in again.

newPassword.label: New password
newPassword.hint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter and one number

newPassword.min: Password must be at least 8 characters
newPassword.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
newPassword.number: Password must contain at least one number
newPassword.sameAsCurrent: New password must differ from the current password

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Account deletion is always available and permanently removes your profile.
dangerZone.warning: This action cannot be undone: your tasks, notebooks, and account access will be deleted forever.
dangerZone.confirmDescription: You are deleting account {{email}}. After confirmation, the data cannot be restored.

password.label: Current password
password.placeholder: Enter your current password to confirm

errors.notFoundDescription: The link may be outdated, the page may have moved, or the address may be incorrect.
errors.errorBoundaryDescription: The application hit an unexpected error. Try again or reload the page.
errors.loadingFail: Task not found. It may have been deleted or the link is incorrect.

common.URL: VITE_URL is not defined in .env file

notepad.CONFLICT: A notepad with this name already exists
notepad.UNDEFINED: Notepad not found or system notepad was selected

auth.CONFLICT: A user with this email already exists
auth.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your account is not verified yet. Follow the link from the email to confirm it.

tasks.CONFLICT: A task with this name already exists
